name: Extra Mile Studios
short_description: Veteran co-development and art outsource studio providing dedicated art & code resources to studios and publishers worldwide for over 20 years
about:
Extra Mile Studios is a veteran co-development and art outsource studio specialising in providing dedicated art & code resources to studios and publishers around the world.

Based in Glasgow, Scotland, our client-first approach has ensured we have remained one of the UK's most trusted names in co-development for over 20 years.

Extra Mile Studios is part of the Reforged Studios group.

news.title: Reforged Studios Kickstarts Growth Plans With The Acquisition Of Ground Shatter & Extra Mile Studios
